attributes.description: Alerts when the get-operation miss ratio exceeds 20% (hit ratio < 80%). Low hit ratios mean the cache is ineffective.
attributes.name: [Memcached OTel] Low hit ratio for get operations

investigation_guide.blob:
## Memcached low hit ratio for get operations

### What fired
True hit ratio (`100 - operation_hit_ratio`) dropped below 80%.

### Why it matters
Low cache hit ratios mean the backing store absorbs more traffic, raising latency and load. Causes: cold cache post-restart, working-set shift, insufficient memory.

### Triage
1. Check evictions trend — high evictions correlate with low hit ratio.
2. Inspect recent restarts / deploys.
3. Look at key-distribution patterns.

### Remediation
- Increase memory.
- Adjust TTLs.

### Tuning
- `operation_hit_ratio` actually reports miss ratio (upstream bug); the rule accounts for this.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-memcachedreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE memcached.operation_hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| WHERE operation == "get" OR attributes.operation == "get"
// Bug: operation_hit_ratio actually reports miss ratio (see OTel contrib #30695)
// True hit ratio = 100 - miss_ratio. Alert when hit ratio < 80% (miss > 20%)
| STATS miss_ratio_pct = AVG(memcached.operation_hit_ratio), hit_ratio = 100.0 - AVG(memcached.operation_hit_ratio)
  BY host.name, COALESCE(service.instance.id, host.name)
| WHERE miss_ratio_pct > 20.0
| SORT miss_ratio_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20
